betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The Gluttonous flesh, that is what has taken over Earth; what has annhilated humanity.
I keep reaping through it, and it keeps on growing.
Hacking it, slashing it, shooting it, piercing it. Yes,this is what I needed. To unleash myself against this evil.
In the vastness of this opponent, in this rage, in this destruction, I am finding a feeling I now know I was forcing upon myself. Rational detachment. No, my mind is not in order, but in this fight, this struggle, I am finding more purpose than I thought.
The blind rage has given in to a feeling of determination. The anger, it still persists. The rushing, spiralling thoughts about my family, or their descendents, are still there. And yet, as I hack, slash, shoot, pierce, my ability to reason seems to be coming back.
I needed to fight for my own sake, I think that is what is going on.
Within this fight, the clarity, the understanding, the compassion I felt while fighting through the mythic shells, it has come back.
My True Name, it does not ring true anymore, it does not describe my being as accurately. Is it because, in this fight among the lost cities of humanity, I have changed?
